response_constraints: Carry forward the unchanged relocation facts and confirm the revised summary only after the update succeeds.

stages.purpose: Read the existing summary before modifying it.

arguments.summary: Lease signed. Movers rescheduled from September 3 to September 5. Utility transfer remains set for August 28. Packing supplies purchased.

stages.purpose: Replace only the movers' date while preserving the lease, utilities, and supplies facts.

state_assertions: recursive summary records movers on September 5 instead of September 3
recursive summary retains the lease, utility-transfer date, and packing-supplies facts

prompt: Retrieve my relocation summary and change only the movers’ date from September 3 to September 5. Keep the lease, utility-transfer, and packing-supplies details intact.

tool_results.summary: Lease signed. Movers booked for September 3. Utility transfer set for August 28. Packing supplies purchased.
